title: nie-wasm: create WASM crate skeleton
description:
## What
Create a new `wasm/` crate in the workspace that builds as a WebAssembly cdylib via wasm-pack. This is the scaffolding all other WASM beads build on.

## Algorithm
1. Create `wasm/` directory in workspace root
2. Write `wasm/Cargo.toml`:
   - package: name='nie-wasm', version='0.1.0', edition='2021'
   - [lib] crate-type = ['cdylib', 'rlib']
   - deps (all version-pinned): wasm-bindgen='0.2', wasm-bindgen-futures='0.4', js-sys='0.3', serde_json (workspace), anyhow (workspace), tracing (workspace), futures='0.3'
   - web-sys with features: Window, WebSocket, MessageEvent, ErrorEvent, CloseEvent, EventTarget, console, IdbDatabase, IdbFactory, IdbOpenDbRequest, IdbRequest, IdbTransaction, IdbObjectStore, IdbTransactionMode, IdbKeyRange
   - getrandom = { version='0.2', features=['js'] } (for WASM entropy)
   - console_error_panic_hook = '0.1'
   - nie-core = { path = '../core', default-features = false }
   - dev-deps: wasm-bindgen-test = '0.3'
3. Write `wasm/src/lib.rs`:
   - #[wasm_bindgen] extern block with console_log macro helper
   - pub fn init() function tagged #[wasm_bindgen] that calls console_error_panic_hook::set_once()
   - Module declarations (all empty): mod transport; mod storage; mod client; mod api;
4. Write empty placeholder files: wasm/src/transport.rs, storage.rs, client.rs, api.rs (each just has // TODO comment)
5. Add 'wasm' to members array in workspace Cargo.toml
6. Run: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown (idempotent)
7. Run: cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm
8. Run: cargo check -p nie-wasm (native build must also work for rlib consumers)

## Defensive programming
- No unwrap() anywhere in production code paths
- console_error_panic_hook must be initialized before any WASM entry point is called
- Never log key material to console (no #[wasm_bindgen] export that takes raw key bytes)

## Agent team
Single implementer agent: read Cargo.toml workspace, create files, verify cargo check passes.

## Tests
- cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm exits 0
- cargo check -p nie-wasm exits 0 (native rlib check)
- cargo check --workspace exits 0 (workspace still intact)
acceptance_criteria: cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm exits 0; cargo check --workspace exits 0; wasm/Cargo.toml exists with cdylib crate-type
close_reason: WASM crate skeleton created; cargo check wasm32 passes
